schemaIssues.description: Founded property does not exist in database schema
schemaIssues.solution: Add Founded field as number type or use existing date field

schemaIssues.description: Scripts reference "Founded" but actual field is "Year Founded"
schemaIssues.solution: Update scripts to use "Year Founded" instead of "Founded"

schemaIssues.description: Company Size property may not exist
schemaIssues.solution: Verify Company Size field exists or create alternative mapping
